name: Juliana Stratton
bio: Juliana Stratton is Illinois Lieutenant Governor and a candidate in the 2026 Democratic primary for U.S. Senate. She previously served in the Illinois House and became lieutenant governor in 2019. (Source: Shaw Local primary ballot guide, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)
prior_office: Lieutenant Governor of Illinois; Illinois House

jacket.note: FEC totals pending direct ETL import.
